claudeResult.resultText:
Dashboard built and rendered! Your CI status dashboard now includes:

- **KPI Row**: Three metrics tiles displaying Build Pass Rate (94%), Avg Build Time (4m12s), and Open Incidents (2)
- **Build Durations Chart**: Bar chart showing build times in minutes across the 7-day period (Mon-Sun)
- **Deploy Counts Chart**: Line chart showing daily deploy counts across the same period

All components are arranged in a Stack with the metrics in a 3-column Grid at the top, followed by the two charts in Cards below. The dashboard is ready to view at the canvas URL.
